metadata.description: Name of the environment (used to generate resource names)
Custom domain name for the web app (e.g., yourdomain.com)
Subdomain for the web app (e.g., app)
Use shared production infrastructure (for CI/CD branch deployments). When false, creates standalone infra.

variables.containerRegistryName: [if(variables('isStandalone'), format('cr{0}{1}', parameters('environmentName'), uniqueString(subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', parameters('environmentName')))), format('crproduction{0}', uniqueString(subscription().subscriptionId, variables('sharedResourceGroupName'))))]

metadata.description: Name of the Container Apps Environment
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Name of the Container Apps Environment
Container image name (leave empty for initial deployment)
CPU cores allocated to the container
The domain name for the DNS zone
Target hostname for the CNAME record
Domain verification token from Container App
Name of the Container Apps Environment
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Name of the Container Apps Environment
Container image name (leave empty for initial deployment)
CPU cores allocated to the container
Name of the Container Apps Environment
Container image name (leave empty for initial deployment)
CPU cores allocated to the container
Target hostname for the CNAME record
Domain verification token from Container App

AZURE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY_ENDPOINT.value: [if(variables('isProduction'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, 'rg-production'), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'container-apps'), '2025-04-01').outputs.registryLoginServer.value, if(variables('isStandalone'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'container-apps-standalone'), '2025-04-01').outputs.registryLoginServer.value, format('{0}.azurecr.io', variables('containerRegistryName'))))]

WEB_URI.value: [if(variables('isProduction'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, 'rg-production'), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'web-production'), '2025-04-01').outputs.uri.value, if(variables('isStandalone'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'web-standalone'), '2025-04-01').outputs.uri.value, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('sharedResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('web-{0}', parameters('environmentName'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.uri.value))]

WEB_AZURE_URI.value: [if(variables('isProduction'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, 'rg-production'), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'web-production'), '2025-04-01').outputs.uri.value, if(variables('isStandalone'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'web-standalone'), '2025-04-01').outputs.uri.value, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('sharedResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('web-{0}', parameters('environmentName'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.uri.value))]

CONTAINER_APP_NAME.value: [if(variables('isProduction'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, 'rg-production'), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'web-production'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value, if(variables('isStandalone'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'web-standalone'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('sharedResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('web-{0}', parameters('environmentName'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value))]

DOMAIN_VERIFICATION_ID.value: [if(variables('isProduction'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, 'rg-production'), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'web-production'), '2025-04-01').outputs.verificationId.value, if(variables('isStandalone'), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('rg-{0}', parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'web-standalone'), '2025-04-01').outputs.verificationId.value, reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, variables('sharedResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('web-{0}', parameters('environmentName'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.verificationId.value))]
